title: minuartia fasciculata subsp. rostrata
intro: Minuartia fasciculata subsp. rostrata, also known as Rock Purslane, is a low-growing, succulent perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin issues, and infections. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Rock Purslane include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, minor cuts, and scrapes.
